message: The other night, we lost power for a few hours during a storm, and I couldn’t help but chuckle at myself. I was that gloriously over-prepared person, proudly pulling out my trusty flashlights, lanterns, and even a power bank for my phone. My family teased me about my ‘emergency supply stash,’ but there I was, feeling like a hero as I lit up the room and kept our devices charged. We ended up having a mini family game night by lantern light, which turned out to be a lovely bonding experience. It’s funny how a little preparation can turn an inconvenience into a cherished memory! How do you keep the good vibes going during a blackout?
